PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Juliette Robertson, via ZOOM, for Allan Wong, Petitioner.

The court at the outset points counsel to the issue regarding clarification of line of succession. Counsel reports the following relationships and dates of death and on the record: Kai Wong, spouse, October 27, 2016, and, Patrick Wong, son, October 4, 2017.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
